_comment: Local cache of known agent skills/plugins. Keep real skill code in source repos unless explicitly vendored.

skills.name: commit-commands
skills.description: Official Anthropic git workflow commands: commit, PR, branch.

skills.name: qodo-skills
skills.description: AI-assisted test generation for unit and integration tests.

skills.name: pr-review-toolkit
skills.description: Code review checklist and test coverage checks for PRs.

skills.name: context7
skills.description: Version-aware docs lookup to avoid pasting documentation into chat.

skills.name: session-report
skills.description: HTML token analytics report showing which commands and skills cost most.

skills.name: codex-official-catalog
skills.description: Official OpenAI Codex skills catalog reference for creating and importing Agent Skills.

skills.name: planning-with-files
skills.description: File-based planning for BA briefs, research notes, long-running tasks, and multi-agent handoff.

skills.name: browser-qa
skills.description: Browser automation, screenshots, form checks, and visual smoke testing for dashboard/web UI.

skills.name: github-actions-debugger
skills.description: CI/CD log triage for GitHub Actions, Jenkins, build failures, test failures, and deployment pipelines.

skills.name: gitops-workflow
skills.description: ArgoCD, Flux, Kustomize, Kubernetes manifests, image tag bumps, and secret boundary workflow.

skills.name: accessibility-auditor
skills.description: WCAG accessibility checks for keyboard navigation, contrast, focus states, labels, and semantic HTML.

skills.name: skill-sync
skills.description: Sync, catalog, import, and update SKILL.md-compatible skills across Claude, Codex, ChatGPT, and OpenCode.

skills.name: self-improving-agent
skills.description: Capture mistakes, recurring patterns, review feedback, and memory updates into reusable agent rules.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Security review for auth, session handling, secrets, CI/CD credentials, dependencies, and Kubernetes manifests.
